name: workItems.move
description: [DEPRECATED: Use workItems.moveToColumn instead] Move a work item between columns or change its position within a column. workItems.moveToColumn is a strict superset that also supports status_mapping and audit fields.

item_id.description: Work item ID or display ID (e.g. 'myproject-42') to move (required)

position.description: New position within the column (0 = top)

user_id.description: ID of the user moving the item

org_id.description: Optional organization ID for multi-tenant context
